 {"id":"bd-oai","title":"Epic: Dual-Mode Semantics & Deterministic Replay","description":"Dual-mode execution: Strict (default, ABI-compatible, no repair, <20ns) and Hardened (deterministic repair per policy tables, structured JSON evidence per repair, <200ns). Mode selected immutably at process startup for deterministic replay. RuntimeKernelSnapshot (154-field state capture). Evidence symbol records with RaptorQ-inspired redundancy.

## Success Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Success Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Session 30: Epic closed — all children completed

All child beads closed:
- bd-oai.1: Dual-mode selection + strict/hardened execution paths ✅
- bd-oai.2: RuntimeKernelSnapshot (165+ fields) + deterministic replay ✅  
- bd-oai.3: Evidence symbol records + RaptorQ-inspired redundancy ✅

Verification:
- 16 E2E tests in runtime_math_dual_mode_e2e_test.rs (all pass)
- 33 evidence system tests (all pass)
- Deterministic replay produces identical decision streams and JSONL logs
- Branch-diversity enforcement: Healthy/NearViolation/Violation states verified
- Golden snapshot regression gate: JSON equality under deterministic inputs","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-13T17:58:48.791246202Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-12T05:13:40.030481360Z","closed_at":"2026-03-12T05:13:32Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["determinism","dual-mode","epic","frankenlibc","replay"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-oai","depends_on_id":"bd-32e","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1124,"issue_id":"bd-oai","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Alien+Extreme uplift pass (2026-02-13): this epic is now covered by the full open-backlog EV matrix at artifacts/planning/open_beads_alien_uplift.v1.json (summary markdown: artifacts/planning/open_beads_alien_uplift.v1.md).

Execution contract applied:
- One-lever optimization waves only (profile -> prove -> implement -> verify).
- Budgeted mode + deterministic fallback trigger required per child bead.
- Graveyard route mappings and baseline comparators are pre-attached in matrix rows.
- Promotion gate: EV >= 2.0 and no cycle introduction in bv --robot-insights.","created_at":"2026-02-13T22:25:03Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-oai.1","title":"Dual-Mode: Mode selection at process startup (immutable, deterministic)","description":"Implement mode selection: Strict vs Hardened chosen at process startup (env var / config), immutable thereafter. Must guarantee deterministic replay: same mode + same inputs = same outputs. Mode state stored in thread-local for zero-cost access.

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"MagentaFalcon","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:01:54.495718406Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-25T07:03:43.325060776Z","closed_at":"2026-02-25T07:03:43.325029658Z","close_reason":"Thread-local immutable mode caching and deterministic startup selection completed; verification evidence already logged in comment #455.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["dual-mode","frankenlibc","startup"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-oai.1","depends_on_id":"bd-oai","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1125,"issue_id":"bd-oai.1","author":"MagentaFalcon","text":"2026-02-25 completion pass (MagentaFalcon): implemented thread-local runtime mode caching in crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/runtime_policy.rs for zero-cost hot-path mode reads after first resolution, while preserving process-immutable mode semantics. Added helper wiring: load/store/clear thread-local cache; integrated caching into resolved/race/startup branches; preserved strict fallback behavior for unresolved/reentrant paths. Updated tests: ModeStateGuard now snapshots/restores TLS mode cache; cache_reset_reparses_mode_from_environment clears TLS cache; added mode_populates_thread_local_cache_after_resolution. Verification (all heavy commands via rch): rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-abi --all-targets (pass); rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi mode_ -- --nocapture (pass; includes new mode_populates_thread_local_cache_after_resolution + existing mode immutability/logging tests). Known unrelated gate failures: rch exec -- cargo fmt --check -p frankenlibc-abi fails on pre-existing formatting drift in crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/string_abi.rs; rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-abi --all-targets -- -D warnings fails on pre-existing lint debt across math_abi/string_abi/dlfcn_abi/pthread_abi/time_abi not introduced by this change. Artifact refs: crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/runtime_policy.rs","created_at":"2026-02-25T06:09:23Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-oai.2","title":"Dual-Mode: RuntimeKernelSnapshot (154-field state capture)","description":"Implement RuntimeKernelSnapshot: 154-field deterministic snapshot capturing state of all controllers. Each field has explicit units, expected ranges, and monotone property tracking. Must be serializable to JSON for evidence ledger integration. Snapshot capture must be atomic and consistent.

## Acceptance Criteria
See `acceptance_criteria` field.","acceptance_criteria":"## Acceptance Criteria
Implementation must preserve all existing functionality and claims while adding deterministic verification coverage.

### Mandatory Verification Gate
- Comprehensive unit tests are required for all touched logic: positive, negative, adversarial, and regression.
- Deterministic e2e scripts are required for all externally visible behavior in strict and hardened mode where relevant.
- Structured logs are mandatory for unit/e2e runs with fields: `trace_id`, `mode`, `api_family`, `symbol`, `decision_path`, `healing_action`, `errno`, `latency_ns`, `artifact_refs`.
- Closure evidence must include exact test commands, expected outputs/thresholds, and representative failure signatures.
- CI must persist logs, diffs, and reports with deterministic naming and retention for replay/triage.
- Tooling contract: deterministic orchestration/traceability uses `/dp/asupersync`, and deterministic diff/snapshot/TUI evidence uses `/dp/frankentui`.","notes":"### Mandatory Test/E2E Logging Checklist
- Test command set is documented in bead notes before closure (unit + e2e + perf where applicable).
- Expected output and pass/fail thresholds are documented per command.
- Failure triage snippets are documented (top failure classes + where to inspect artifacts).
- Evidence index entry links logs, parity diffs, and benchmark/proof artifacts.
- Overload behavior logging is required when applicable: pressure signal, degradation mode, selected policy, guard decision, rollback trigger.","status":"closed","priority":0,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:01:54.604602901Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-10T01:41:32.907289265Z","closed_at":"2026-03-10T01:41:32.876858511Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["dual-mode","frankenlibc","snapshot"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-oai.2","depends_on_id":"bd-oai","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-26T06:17:33Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1279,"issue_id":"bd-oai.2","author":"Codex","text":"Implemented structured runtime-kernel snapshot fixtures end-to-end.

What landed:
- `RuntimeKernelSnapshot` now derives `Serialize`/`Deserialize` in `crates/frankenlibc-membrane/src/runtime_math/mod.rs`.
- `crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/kernel_snapshot.rs` now emits structured `snapshot` payloads instead of legacy `snapshot_lines` debug text.
- `crates/frankenlibc-harness/src/snapshot_diff.rs` now diffs structured JSON field maps, including arrays, instead of reparsing debug strings.
- Added regression tests covering structured fixture serialization and structured diff behavior.
- Regenerated `tests/runtime_math/golden/kernel_snapshot_smoke.v1.json` from an exact `rch`-generated 512-step snapshot and updated `tests/runtime_math/golden/sha256sums.txt`.

Verification:
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness kernel_snapshot -- --nocapture` ✅
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness snapshot_diff -- --nocapture` ✅
- `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` ✅
- `rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings` ✅
- `(cd tests/runtime_math/golden && sha256sum -c sha256sums.txt)` ✅

Notes:
- `cargo fmt --check` still reports unrelated pre-existing formatting drift in `crates/frankenlibc-abi` files outside this bead.
- MCP Agent Mail remains unavailable in this environment (`mcp_agent_mail/health_check` timed out; local CLI module was also unavailable), so I could not register/send thread updates there and tracked completion via beads instead.","created_at":"2026-03-10T01:41:17Z"}]}
